- **Title:** Travel advertisement showcasing flight options to Asian destinations.
- **DistinctiveFeatures:** Four rectangular panels displaying flight offers with images representing distinct cities in Asia. Each panel includes text in Russian indicating departure locations and prices.
- **ObjectsAndLayout:**
  - [top left] Panel featuring an ornate Chinese building with cherry blossoms, text: "Из Москвы в Пекин" (From Moscow to Beijing), price: "От 27 012 ₽".
  - [top right] Panel with a skyline of modern buildings, text: "Из Москвы в Гуанчжоу" (From Moscow to Guangzhou), price: "От 25 392 ₽".
  - [bottom left] Panel showcasing the Shanghai skyline at night, text: "Из Красноярска в Шанхай" (From Krasnoyarsk to Shanghai), price: "От 16 197 ₽".
  - [bottom right] Panel with a mountain view and traditional architecture, text: "Из Красноярска в Пекин" (From Krasnoyarsk to Beijing), price: "От 13 227 ₽".
